# Health Pointe Jacksonville

> Health Pointe Jacksonville is a licensed acupuncture and wellness clinic located at 3840 Belfort Road #305, Jacksonville, FL 32216. The clinic is led by Dr. Julee Miller (DAcCHM, AP, FABORM) — one of Jacksonville, Florida's only ABORM-certified holistic fertility specialists. The clinic specializes in Women's Health and Infertility, chronic pain, pelvic floor dysfunction, neurological disorders, sports recovery, pediatric care, and long COVID syndrome. Phone: (904) 448-0046. Email: hello@hpjax.com.

## Business Information

- **Name:** Health Pointe Jacksonville Acupuncture + Wellness Clinic
- **Address:** 3840 Belfort Road #305, Jacksonville, FL 32216
- **Phone:** (904) 448-0046
- **Email:** hello@hpjax.com
- **Hours:** Monday 10am–6pm · Tuesday–Thursday 9am–6pm · Friday 9am–2pm
- **Booking:** https://healthpointejacksonville.acubliss.app/portal/booking/

## Lead Practitioner

Dr. Julee Miller holds the following credentials:
- **DAcCHM** — Doctor of Acupuncture and Chinese Herbal Medicine
- **AP** — Florida Licensed Acupuncture Physician
- **FABORM** — Fellow of the American Board of Oriental Reproductive Medicine (ABORM)

Dr. Miller is Jacksonville, FL's top-voted ABORM certified holistic fertility specialist and treats Women's Health, Infertility, chronic pain, neurological conditions, and more.

## Services

### Women's Health
- [Women's Health Overview](https://hpjax.com/womens-health/): Integrative acupuncture for hormonal balance, PCOS, endometriosis, menopause, mood regulation, and women's wellness in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Fertility Programs](https://hpjax.com/services/fertility-acupuncture-jacksonville-fl-aborm-certified-dr-julee-miller/): ABORM-certified fertility acupuncture supporting natural conception, IVF outcomes, hormonal regulation, and cycle optimization in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Pelvic Floor Acupuncture](https://hpjax.com/pelvic-floor/): Treatment for pelvic pain, bladder issues, incontinence, and postpartum recovery in Jacksonville, FL.

### Acupuncture Treatments
- [Acupuncture Services](https://hpjax.com/services/acupuncture/): Evidence-based acupuncture for pain, stress, anxiety, and whole-body wellness. Florida-licensed practitioners.
- [Chronic Pain](https://hpjax.com/chronic-pain/): Acupuncture for fibromyalgia, arthritis, migraines, and persistent pain conditions in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Neurological Disorders](https://hpjax.com/neurological-disorders/): Acupuncture support for neuropathy, stroke recovery, MS, and neurological conditions.
- [Sports Care](https://hpjax.com/services/sports-acupuncture/): Sports acupuncture for injury recovery, performance optimization, and musculoskeletal issues in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Pediatric Care](https://hpjax.com/services/pediatric-acupuncture/): Gentle, age-appropriate acupuncture for children and teens.
- [Quit Smoking Program](https://hpjax.com/services/quit-smoking-program-jacksonville/): Acupuncture-based smoking cessation program in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Long COVID Syndrome](https://hpjax.com/long-covid-syndrome/): Acupuncture treatment for fatigue, brain fog, and persistent symptoms of long COVID.

### Other Services
- [Massage Therapy](https://hpjax.com/services/massage-therapy-jacksonville/): Licensed massage therapy for relaxation, pain relief, and recovery in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Cosmetic Acupuncture](https://hpjax.com/services/cosmetic-facial-acupuncture/): Natural facial rejuvenation through cosmetic acupuncture — a non-surgical alternative to cosmetic procedures.
- [O3 Regenerative Therapy](https://hpjax.com/services/o3-regenerative-therapy/): Ozone therapy for tissue healing, inflammation reduction, and regeneration.
- [Injection Therapy](https://hpjax.com/services/acupuncture-point-injection-therapy/): Acupuncture point injection therapy for targeted pain relief and healing.
- [B12 Injections](https://hpjax.com/services/b12-injections/): Vitamin B12 injections for energy, neurological support, and wellness in Jacksonville, FL.

- [About](https://hpjax.com/about/): Mission, values, and background of Health Pointe Jacksonville.

- [Blog](https://hpjax.com/blog/): Articles on acupuncture, fertility, women's health, and wellness by Dr. Julee Miller.
- [Contact](https://hpjax.com/contact/): Contact form, phone, address, and directions for Health Pointe Jacksonville.
- [Book an Appointment](https://hpjax.com/book/): Online scheduling for acupuncture and wellness services in Jacksonville, FL.
- [Gift Cards](https://hpjax.com/gift-cards/): Purchase gift cards for acupuncture and wellness services.
- [Verify Insurance](http://admin.mindfulbillingllc.com//patient/add?crpId=USAvXG4oMeMZJ%2FiJW%2Bt0Sw%3D%3D): Check insurance coverage for acupuncture services.

## Insurance

Health Pointe Jacksonville accepts most major insurance plans including United Healthcare, Humana, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Cigna, and Medicare. Call (904) 448-0046 to verify your specific benefits.

## Location & Service Area

Located in Jacksonville, FL (Duval County). Serving patients throughout Jacksonville, Southside, Mandarin, Fleming Island, Orange Park, Ponte Vedra, and the greater Northeast Florida area.
